---
name: ✨ Add New Broker
about: Suggest adding a data broker to the tool
title: '[BROKER] Add CompanyName'
labels: 'enhancement, new-broker'
assignees: ''
---

## Broker Information

**Company Name:**  
(Full legal name)

**Privacy Contact Email:**  
(Usually `privacy@company.nl` – check company website)

**Category:**  
(Pick one: Credit Bureau / Ad-Tech & Tracking / Media & Publishers / Telecom / Retail & E-Commerce / Analytics / Marketing)

---

## Why Add This Broker?

**Relevance to Netherlands:**  
(e.g., "Active on 10+ Dutch websites", "Dutch subsidiary of international company", "Processes Dutch citizen data")

**Source / Evidence:**  
(How do you know they process personal data? Link to their privacy policy, website, etc.)

---

## Additional Info (Optional)

**Note for Users:**  
(Any warnings? AP boetes? Known for dark patterns? Leave blank if none)

**Contact Form Instead of Email:**  
- [ ] Yes, this broker requires a web form
- [ ] Form URL: (if yes, paste here)

---

## Checklist

Before submitting:
- [ ] I checked this broker isn't already in the tool
- [ ] I verified the privacy email on their website
- [ ] This broker is relevant to Netherlands

---

**Thanks for helping expand the tool!** 🙏
